sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Beazer Homes USA, Inc. Experiences Revision in Stock Evaluation Amid Market Challenges
feed.summary: Beazer Homes USA, Inc. has adjusted its valuation, characterized by a high P/E ratio of 63 and a low price-to-book value of 0.52. The company has faced significant performance declines, with its stock decreasing 14.17% in the past week, 32.74% over one month, and 14.06% over one year, underperforming the S&P 500. These financial metrics and performance trends highlight its unique position within the furniture and home furnishing industry.

feed.title: B2Gold Corp. Hits Day Low of CAD 5.31 Amid Price Pressure
feed.summary: B2Gold Corp. experienced significant stock volatility, hitting an intraday low of CAD 5.31 and declining 18.7% on March 20, 2026. Despite a positive annual return of 14.93%, the company has recorded negative results for six consecutive quarters and faces challenges with low operating cash flow. However, it maintains a favorable debt-to-equity ratio of 0.05.

feed.title: Williams Sonoma to open at Hughes Landing in The Woodlands Fall 2026
feed.summary: Williams Sonoma is set to open a new 5,000-square-foot store at Hughes Landing Retail Row in The Woodlands by Fall 2026. This addition will bring its signature kitchenware, home furnishings, and gourmet food products to the mixed-use destination. The Howard Hughes Communities confirmed this development, enhancing Hughes Landing's retail offerings.

feed.title: Pentair (PNR) Announces Chair David A. Jones to Retire
feed.summary: Pentair plc (NYSE:PNR) announced that its Chair, David A. Jones, will retire from the Board on May 5, 2026, after serving since 2003 and as Chair since 2018. T. Michael Glenn, an independent director, will succeed him. This announcement follows recent positive Q4 earnings for Pentair, exceeding analyst expectations, and a slight reduction in its price target by Seaport Research analyst Scott Graham, who nonetheless maintained a Buy rating.

feed.title: Immix stock wins Morgan Stanley bullish view (IMMX:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has initiated coverage of Immix Biopharma (IMMX) with an Overweight rating and a $20 price target, causing the stock to trade higher. Analyst Judah Frommer based his bullish view on the potential of the company's lead candidate, NXC-201. This development highlights positive analyst sentiment regarding Immix Biopharma's prospects.

feed.title: Linde plc stock surges on quarterly earnings beat and robust growth outlook amid industrial gas demand boom
feed.summary: Linde plc exceeded quarterly earnings and revenue expectations, leading to a significant stock rally. The industrial gas giant reported strong sales and profit growth, driven by resilient demand in electronics, healthcare, and clean energy sectors, particularly in North America. The company's defensive positioning, strong free cash flow, and sustained dividend increases make it an attractive investment amid economic uncertainties.

feed.title: The Trade Desk says Omnicom audits ‘have not identified any issues’
feed.summary: The Trade Desk reported that Omnicom's audits found no issues, contrasting with Publicis's recent audit alleging hidden fees and unauthorized features. This comes amidst ongoing tensions between The Trade Desk and agency holding companies regarding transparency and direct client relationships. The demand-side platform's shares tumbled following the news, highlighting the broader debate around programmatic advertising billing practices.

feed.title: Principal Financial Group stock faces mixed signals after Morgan Stanley upgrade amid shifting insur
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group (PFF) received an upgrade from Morgan Stanley to Equal-weight with an $81 target due to an improved revenue outlook and reduced business risks. Despite this positive signal and an attractive 3.80% dividend yield, the stock faces mixed signals from recent fund sales and downgrades. US investors are monitoring its resilience near 52-week highs and its focus on stable, long-term products in a volatile insurance sector.

feed.title: Intel Corporation stock faces critical juncture amid AI chip race and foundry delays on Nasdaq
feed.summary: Intel Corporation is at a critical juncture due to delays in its advanced 18A manufacturing process and intense competition in the AI chip market from rivals like TSMC and Nvidia. The company aims to reclaim leadership through its US-based foundry services, fueled by CHIPS Act funding, providing a domestic alternative to supply chains. Despite challenges, Intel's stock offers leveraged exposure to AI growth at discounted multiples, with potential future catalysts from AI PC launches and strategic partnerships.

feed.title: Kinder Morgan, Phillips 66 extend open season for proposed Western Gateway pipeline (KMI:NYSE)
feed.summary: Kinder Morgan and Phillips 66 have extended the open season for their proposed 1,300-mile Western Gateway pipeline system. The pipeline is planned to run from St. Louis, Missouri, to California. This extension allows more time for bidding on the remaining capacity in the system.

feed.title: MGM Resorts Opens Bookings for New All-Inclusive Vacation Bundle
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has introduced a new all-inclusive vacation bundle for its Luxor Hotel & Casino and Excalibur Hotel & Casino properties on the Las Vegas Strip. Starting at $330 plus tax for a two-night stay for two, the package includes accommodations, daily resort fees, dining at select MGM Resorts restaurants, entertainment, and parking. Bookings are now open for stays beginning April 6, featuring dynamic pricing and no blackout dates.

feed.title: Brewer, Attorneys & Counselors: Former CFO Prevails – Judge Denies CBIZ Bid to Halt Valuation Fraud Lawsuit; Discovery to Proceed
feed.summary: A federal judge has denied motions by CBIZ Inc. and CBIZ MAG LLC to halt a lawsuit alleging valuation fraud, allowing the case to proceed into full discovery. Christopher Podlasek, former CFO of AmeriTex Holdings LLC, claims that Marcum LLP conspired to produce a materially understated business valuation, depriving him of over $25 million owed for his equity stake. The ruling paves the way for a trial to investigate allegations of intentional breaches of duty and shines a light on corporate valuation services.

feed.title: PepsiCo hits pair of water replenishment, stewardship targets
feed.summary: PepsiCo has achieved two critical water sustainability targets, moving closer to its 2030 goal of becoming net water positive. The company now replenishes all water used at its facilities in high-risk watersheds and has adopted the Alliance for Water Stewardship Standard across all manufacturing sites in such areas. These achievements, announced ahead of World Water Day, reflect PepsiCo's commitment to investing in water infrastructure, conservation, and efficiency programs globally, restoring nearly 29 billion liters of water last year.

feed.title: Caterpillar countersues Bobcat in escalating patent fight
feed.summary: Caterpillar is countersuing Bobcat North America, escalating a patent dispute into a broader legal battle over compact machine technologies. Caterpillar, seeking damages and an injunction, alleges infringement on six patents related to machine control, hydraulics, and power management. This counter-suit comes after Bobcat's initial complaint accusing Caterpillar of infringing on 14 patents, broadening the conflict and highlighting intense competition in the global construction equipment market.

feed.title: Threats to cut your power fast? PSEG Long Island says verify first
feed.summary: PSEG Long Island is warning customers about an increase in utility payment scams where imposters threaten immediate power shutoffs if payment is not made through specific methods like web-based services, prepaid cards, or Bitcoin. The company advises customers to "Stop and verify" by checking their account online or calling the official customer service number (1-800-490-0025) before complying with any demands. PSEG Long Island emphasizes that its representatives will never demand immediate payment using these unconventional methods, nor will they require deposits for meter installations or discuss account details with anyone other than the Customer of Record.

feed.title: DFAC ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns AMEX:DFAC
feed.summary: This article provides an analysis of the Dimensional U.S. Core Equity 2 ETF (DFAC), detailing its key statistics such as AUM, dividend yield, and expense ratio. It outlines DFAC's actively managed strategy focusing on long-term capital appreciation with tax minimization, targeting diversified US companies with a tilt towards small-cap, low relative price, and high profitability firms. The analysis also covers the fund's sector allocation, geographic exposure, top holdings, and recent performance metrics.

feed.title: Can Hormel Foods' International & Foodservice Offset Retail Weakness?
feed.summary: Hormel Foods Corporation is relying on its International and Foodservice segments to counteract a decline in its Retail business. While these segments are performing well, they haven't fully compensated for the weakness in Retail, which saw decreased sales and profits. The company's stock currently trades at a premium, indicating market confidence in its stability despite persistent challenges in the Retail sector.

feed.title: CEG vs. VST: Which Nuclear Stock Has the Edge in the Utility Sector?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) and Vistra Energy Corp. (VST), two prominent U.S. utility companies with significant nuclear operations, to determine which presents a stronger investment opportunity. It compares their earnings growth projections, nuclear energy generation capacity, return on equity, long-term capital expenditure plans, valuation, dividend yields, and recent price performance. Based on these factors, Vistra Energy is deemed to have a marginal edge due to better earnings estimate movements, a stronger return on equity, and a cheaper valuation.

feed.title: UBS Group Lowers Incyte (NASDAQ:INCY) Price Target to $94.00
feed.summary: UBS Group has reduced its price target for Incyte (NASDAQ:INCY) to $94.00 from $104.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating on the biopharmaceutical company's stock. This new target implies a potential upside of 1.72% from the previous closing price. The article also details other recent analyst ratings, Incyte's price performance, Q4 2025 earnings results, and significant insider transactions, as well as institutional investor activity.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC is issuing Buffered Digital Notes linked to the Lesser Performing of the Russell 2000® Index and the S&P 500® Index, fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These notes offer investors a fixed return of at least 9.15% at maturity if the lesser performing index is greater than or equal to its Initial Value or is less by up to 20.00%. Investors should be prepared to forsake interest and dividend payments and risk losing up to 80.00% of their principal.

feed.title: NYSE American Options resolves technical issue that hit trading, market data
feed.summary: NYSE American Options, a division of Intercontinental Exchange (ICE.N), announced on Wednesday that it has resolved a technical issue that had impacted its trading, post-trade, and market data systems. The exchange operator confirmed that all systems are now fully operational. The issue was reported on March 25, 2026, and resolved on the same day.

feed.title: Raymond James maintains Fair Isaac stock rating on score business risks
feed.summary: Raymond James has reiterated an Outperform rating for Fair Isaac (NYSE:FICO) with a $2,010 price target despite recent stock declines, considering the sell-off potentially "overdone." Concerns about the company's Scores business and potential actions by the Federal Housing Finance Agency are legitimate, but Raymond James assigns low probability to market share losses to VantageScore. The firm suggests Fair Isaac will be less aggressive with price increases, a stance supported by InvestingPro data indicating the stock is undervalued and in oversold territory based on its RSI.

feed.title: Tadeu Marroco Sells 9,383 Shares of British American Tobacco (LON:BATS) Stock
feed.summary: Tadeu Marroco, an insider at British American Tobacco (LON:BATS), sold 9,383 shares of the company's stock on March 23rd at an average price of GBX 4,284, totaling £401,967.72. The article notes recent trading activity for BATS, including a share price increase to GBX 4,352 and significant trading volume, alongside financial metrics like market capitalization, P/E ratio, and recent earnings per share. Analyst ratings show a mixed view with a consensus "Hold" rating and a target price of GBX 4,500.

feed.title: Belden bridges shop floor data to cloud analytics, cuts operator time by 3.5 percent
feed.summary: Belden successfully reduced operator time by 3.5 percent at Kamax by integrating shop floor sensors with cloud analytics using its CloudRail platform and AWS IoT Greengrass. This digital transformation enabled real-time data flows, highlighting Belden's ongoing focus on industrial automation and connectivity. The company continues to develop solutions, including the LioN-X LC module and connectivity for mobile assets, to enhance efficiency in manufacturing.

feed.title: FedEx launches same-day delivery options to compete with Amazon, Walmart
feed.summary: FedEx has announced a new same-day delivery service for retailers, offering two-hour and end-of-day options to help them compete with established fast delivery services from Amazon and Walmart. This initiative allows retailers to manage the additional shipping costs by either displaying them to customers or incorporating them into product pricing. FedEx has partnered with OneRail to execute these rapid deliveries.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive Receives Shareholder Proposal from National Legal and Policy Center
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive Company has received a shareholder proposal from the National Legal and Policy Center. The proposal requests the removal of Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) considerations from board candidate selections. Colgate-Palmolive's board recommends shareholders vote against this proposal at the upcoming annual meeting on May 8, 2026.

feed.title: Capital One Adjusts Price Target on Diamondback Energy to $266 From $205, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Capital One has increased its price target for Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ: FANG) to $266 from the previous $205, while retaining an "Overweight" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a more optimistic outlook on the oil and gas exploration and production company's future performance. The news was published on March 25, 2026, at 12:36 PM EDT.

feed.title: NiSource Inc. stock faces regulatory scrutiny amid Midwest utility rate hikes and $5.3B capex push
feed.summary: NiSource Inc. is facing regulatory pushback on proposed rate increases, requiring state commission approval to fund its aggressive $5.3 billion capital expenditure plan for 2026, aimed at grid upgrades and renewable integration. Investors are closely watching these regulatory outcomes as they will impact the utility's ability to maintain earnings stability and continue its dividend growth, especially in a high-interest rate environment. The company's strategy involves expanding its rate base and transitioning to cleaner energy, posing a balanced risk-reward profile for income-oriented investors amidst economic uncertainty.

feed.title: UBS Lowers Price Target for Incyte (INCY) While Maintaining Neut
feed.summary: UBS analyst Ashwani Verma has lowered the price target for Incyte (INCY) from $104.00 to $94.00, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other recent analyst ratings, including a downgrade to Hold by Jefferies and continued Buy ratings from HC Wainwright & Co., reflecting a mixed outlook from financial experts. Incyte, known for its small-molecule drugs like Jakafi, currently has an average target price of $107.67 from 22 analysts, suggesting a potential upside of 16.83% from its current price.

feed.title: AstraZeneca’s CHOICE Survey Targets Real-World Drivers of EGFR-TKI Use in China
feed.summary: AstraZeneca's CHOICE study is a non-interventional survey exploring factors influencing Chinese doctors' and patients' decisions for first-line EGFR-TKI treatments for advanced non-small cell lung cancer. The study aims to understand preferences regarding efficacy, side effects, cost, and convenience, to sharpen AstraZeneca's marketing and positioning in China's competitive EGFR market. While ongoing, the study is descriptive and market-focused rather than testing new drugs, providing insights into prescribing patterns and preference trends.

feed.title: Costco’s new energy drink delights fans, rattles competition
feed.summary: Costco has launched a new line of Kirkland Signature Sparkling Energy Drinks, available in 24-packs for $16.99, featuring Tropical, Orange, and Peach flavors. Each can contains 200mg of caffeine, making them a significantly cheaper alternative to brands like Celsius, which led to a nearly 7% drop in Celsius's stock after the release. Despite the competition, analysts suggest Celsius's market position is secure due to its broader accessibility and potential for product diversification.

feed.title: Bank of Montreal Is Maintained at Sector Perform by RBC Capital
feed.summary: RBC Capital has maintained its Sector Perform rating on Bank of Montreal (BMO). This indicates the firm sees the stock performing in line with the overall sector.

feed.title: 10 Top Manufacturing Companies in Detroit
feed.summary: Detroit, known as the Motor City, is a significant hub for automotive and industrial manufacturing, evolving into a center for innovation. The article highlights ten leading manufacturing companies in the Detroit area, including major car manufacturers like General Motors, Stellantis, and Rivian, as well as key suppliers such as Lear Corporation, Magna International, and Dauch. Beyond the automotive sector, companies like AJM Packaging and General Dynamics showcase the region's diverse manufacturing landscape.

feed.title: QUALCOMM Incorporated stock plunges over 25% year-to-date on Nasdaq amid AI slowdown fears and China
feed.summary: QUALCOMM Incorporated (ISIN: US7475251036) stock has plummeted over 25% year-to-date on Nasdaq, closing at 127.70 USD on March 24, 2026. This decline reflects investor concerns over a potential slowdown in AI demand, inventory build-ups, and escalating geopolitical tensions with China, impacting the semiconductor sector. Analysts maintain an "Accumulate" rating with a target price suggesting modest upside, emphasizing Qualcomm's robust profitability and strategic diversification into automotive and IoT to counter mobile segment challenges.

feed.title: Equinix Targets Talent Gap as AI Infrastructure Demand Surges
feed.summary: Equinix is expanding its global workforce development programs to combat a growing talent shortage in the data center industry, a critical challenge as AI infrastructure demand accelerates. The company's initiatives include expanding its "Pathways to Tech" program for young students, launching a Data Center Technician Training Coalition, and standardizing apprenticeship and internship programs globally. This strategic shift aims to proactively build talent pipelines rather than just competing for existing skilled labor, positioning workforce development as a key differentiator in the AI era.

feed.title: FedEx Says Tax Code Supports $84 Million Offset Credit on Appeal
feed.summary: FedEx is appealing a tax dispute regarding an $84 million tax credit. The company argues that the plain language of the Internal Revenue Code supports its claim for "offset earnings" paid on foreign subsidiaries, and that a lower court decision in its favor should be upheld. FedEx asserts it met the requirements of IRC Section 960(a)(3) for a US shareholder to claim credits for foreign taxes paid by its international affiliates.

feed.title: RTX Corporation stock faces headwinds from Pratt & Whitney engine recalls and missile settlement ami
feed.summary: RTX Corporation faces significant financial headwinds from a $1 billion missile settlement liability and $2.8 billion in Pratt & Whitney engine recall costs. Despite these challenges, the company benefits from a record $202 billion defense backlog, driven by strong demand for military hardware like F-35 engines and Patriot missile interceptors amidst global tensions. The stock remains a key holding for US investors due to its role in Pentagon spending and Dividend Aristocrat status, with its defense segments providing insulation against commercial aerospace volatility.

feed.title: Can Qualcomm's Advanced AI Camera for Security & IoT Drive Profits?
feed.summary: Qualcomm is transforming the physical security industry with advanced AI-powered cameras, shifting from traditional recording to real-time decision-making systems with continuous learning and scalability. The company's platform integrates high-performance, low-power chips, user-friendly software for AI development, and large-scale device management, allowing for regular updates and recurring revenue. Despite these innovations and diverse applications in security and IoT, Qualcomm faces strong competition from companies like NXP Semiconductors and Analog Devices, and its stock performance and earnings estimates have shown recent declines.

feed.title: NYSE Content Update: Michael + Susan Dell to Ring Opening Bell with Invest America
feed.summary: The NYSE daily pre-market update on March 25, 2026, features Ashley Mastronardi delivering market insights. The update highlights news of a peace plan for the Middle East, an investment round for Verily Health, and Invest America's support for children's investment accounts, with additional details on American Water's 140th anniversary.

feed.title: Dollar General Unveils 'Treasure Hunt' Store Format: Analyst - Dollar General (NYSE:DG)
feed.summary: BofA Securities analyst Robert Ohmes maintained a Buy rating and $175 price target for Dollar General, citing the company's new "treasure hunt" store format. This format, along with initiatives like DG Media Network and digital expansion, is expected to boost gross margin and revenue, helping Dollar General achieve its long-term operating margin target. The company plans extensive remodels in 2026 to further support growth.

feed.title: Sempra stock gains traction amid analyst upgrades and LNG sector momentum in early 2026
feed.summary: Sempra stock is capturing investor attention due to recent buy ratings from firms like Wells Fargo and increasing momentum in the LNG sector. The company benefits from a diversified portfolio that includes regulated California utilities and significant investments in global LNG export projects. This strategic positioning, coupled with rising global demand for U.S.-sourced energy and geopolitical tensions affecting LNG infrastructure, makes Sempra an attractive option for investors seeking stability, defensive yields, and growth potential in the energy market.

feed.title: Ecolab Retirees’ Pension Calculation Challenge Trimmed by Judge
feed.summary: A federal judge has partially allowed a proposed class action lawsuit against Ecolab Inc. to proceed, concerning how the company calculates pensions for certain married employees. While claims from two early retirees were dismissed, a plaintiff who did not retire early can continue with claims under ERISA regarding spousal annuities and the forfeiture of accrued benefits. The lawsuit challenges the company's pension calculation methods for married workers.

feed.title: BeyondSpring Inc. Reports Earnings Results for the Full Year Ended December 31, 2025
feed.summary: BeyondSpring Inc. reported its full-year earnings for 2025, showing a net loss of $1.01 million, a significant improvement from the $11.12 million loss in the prior year. The basic and diluted loss per share from continuing operations remained at $0.21, while the overall basic and diluted loss per share decreased to $0.02. The company focuses on developing innovative therapies for cancer, particularly through its Plinabulin pipeline and Targeted Protein Degradation platform.

feed.title: Technical pressure holds Bit Digital stock below major averages after a moderate session gain
feed.summary: Bit Digital (BTBT) stock rose 3.23% to $1.60 but remains under significant bearish pressure, trading below its 20, 50, and 200-day moving averages. Technical indicators suggest oversold conditions in the near term, but momentum remains negative, limiting prospects for a strong reversal. Experts predict continued sideways trading with prevailing downside risk, advising caution until the stock decisively reclaims the $1.70 resistance level.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Reminds Investors with Losses on their Investment in Aquestive Therapeutics, Inc. of Class Action Lawsuit and Upcoming Deadlines – AQST
feed.summary: The Pomerantz LLP law firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Aquestive Therapeutics, Inc. (AQST) regarding alleged securities fraud or unlawful business practices. The lawsuit follows Aquestive's stock price drop after the FDA identified deficiencies in its New Drug Application for Anaphylm, delaying its approval indefinitely. Investors who purchased Aquestive securities during the Class Period have until May 4, 2026, to seek appointment as Lead Plaintiff.

feed.title: ADT Inc. (NYSE:ADT) Q4 2025 earnings call transcript
feed.summary: This article is an earnings call transcript for ADT Inc. (NYSE:ADT) for the fourth quarter of 2025. It details the discussions, financial results, and management commentary from the company's Q4 2025 earnings call.

feed.title: BPOP SEC Filings - Popular Inc 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides access to Popular Inc.'s SEC filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K forms, detailing its operations as a Puerto Rico-based financial holding company. It highlights recent Form 4 filings regarding director stock transactions and an S-8 filing for its Puerto Rico Savings & Investment Plan, along with general company information and financial data. The platform also offers AI-powered summaries to help investors quickly understand complex banking disclosures.

feed.title: United States Forecast Undervalued Stocks – March 2026
feed.summary: This article lists forecast undervalued stocks in the United States for March 2026, identified as trading below analyst fair value estimates on NYSE and NASDAQ. It highlights potential bullish opportunities for value-oriented investors, featuring companies like Berkshire Hathaway Inc. (BRK-A), NVR, Inc. (NVR), and AutoZone, Inc. (AZO). The article explains how Meyka's screening tool helps investors find mispriced opportunities by comparing current market prices against consensus analyst price targets and emphasizes the importance of combining this data with fundamental analysis.

feed.title: Medtronic’s OmniaSecure defibrillation lead earns expanded FDA indication
feed.summary: Medtronic's OmniaSecure defibrillation lead has received expanded FDA approval to be placed in the heart’s left bundle branch area. This makes it the first defibrillation lead approved for this placement, enabling conduction system pacing to activate the heart's natural electrical system. This expanded indication offers a new option for patients needing both a defibrillator and pacing.

feed.title: Brown & Brown Inc (BRO) Stock Price Down 4% on Mar 25
feed.summary: Shares of Brown & Brown Inc (BRO) fell 4.00% on March 25, trading at $63.84, which is 49.20% below its 52-week high but 0.81% above its 52-week low. Analyst forecasts suggest an average target price of $83.90, implying a 31.43% upside, with a consensus "Hold" rating. GuruFocus estimates a GF Value of $118.33, indicating an 85.35% upside from the current price.
